name: Bug Report
about: Report a crash, module malfunction, or technical error.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

Priority Level

[ ] Critical (Game crash, won't launch, security risk)

[ ] Minor (Module works incorrectly, e.g. Fullbright flickering)

[ ] Small (Typo, UI glitch, aesthetic issue)

Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

Go to '...'

Click on '...'

Scroll down to '...'

See error

Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

Minecraft Version & Loader

Version: [e.g. 1.21.1]

Loader: [e.g. Fabric, Forge, Vanilla]

Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, error logs from the console).
